enrichment.short_description: involve.me builds interactive quizzes, forms, calculators, and surveys that score leads and trigger automated email sequences.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: involve.me lets you build quizzes, forms, and calculators that score and route leads with automated email follow-ups.

features.title: AI funnel builder
features.description: Build complete funnels through a conversational AI agent.

features.title: Drag-and-drop editor
features.description: Create quizzes, forms, calculators, and surveys with 50+ elements.

features.title: Lead scoring & routing
features.description: Qualify and segment leads in real time based on their answers.

features.title: Automated email sequences
features.description: Trigger branching email workflows based on scores and engagement.

features.title: Built-in CRM
features.description: Store contact records with mapped properties and dynamic segments.

features.title: Native payments
features.description: Accept payments directly in funnels via Stripe, PayPal, or Mollie.

features.title: 55+ integrations
features.description: Connect to HubSpot, Salesforce, ActiveCampaign, Mailchimp, Klaviyo, and Pipedrive.

features.title: A/B testing
features.description: Test questions, scoring logic, designs, and email variations.

pros: Free plan available with no credit card required
Native payment processing built into funnels (Stripe, PayPal, Mollie)
55+ native integrations plus a built-in CRM
SOC 2 Type II certified and GDPR-compliant
cons: Free plan is capped at 50 submissions or 500 visits per month
Branding removal and custom domains require the Grow plan or higher
Enterprise-level features like SSO start at $399/month

faqs.question: Is there a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, involve.me offers a free plan with up to 50 submissions or 500 visits per month and no credit card required.

faqs.question: What does the Start plan include?
faqs.answer: $19/month billed annually for 3 live funnels, 1 user, email automations, conditional logic, and 30+ integrations.

faqs.question: What languages does involve.me support?
faqs.answer: The platform is available in English and German.

faqs.question: Can I collect payments through involve.me?
faqs.answer: Yes, native integrations with Stripe, PayPal, and Mollie let you collect payments directly in funnels.

use_cases.title: Lead qualification funnels
use_cases.description: Score and route leads to the right sales rep automatically based on quiz answers.

use_cases.title: Product recommendation quizzes
use_cases.description: Guide shoppers to the right product with a branching quiz.

use_cases.title: Interactive assessments
use_cases.description: Deliver personalized scoring and follow-up sequences for consultation leads.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is involve.me?
paragraphs: involve.me is a platform for building interactive quizzes, forms, calculators, and surveys that qualify leads through scoring and logic. Responses can trigger automated, branching email sequences and feed a built-in CRM.
The platform includes native payment collection (Stripe, PayPal, Mollie), 55+ integrations with tools like HubSpot and Salesforce, and an AI agent that can build a funnel from a conversation.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who involve.me is for
paragraphs: involve.me targets businesses selling higher-value services or products, including financial advisors, insurance brokers, consultants, real estate professionals, and software companies that need to qualify leads before a sales conversation.

enrichment.short_description: Outgrow is a no-code platform for building interactive quizzes, calculators, chatbots, and forms that qualify leads.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Outgrow lets marketers build no-code quizzes, calculators, chatbots, and forms with 1000+ templates to generate leads.

features.title: No-code builder
features.description: Create quizzes, calculators, chatbots, surveys, polls, forms, and assessments without coding.

features.title: 1000+ templates
features.description: Pre-built templates across content types speed up creation.

features.title: Branching logic
features.description: Deliver personalized outcomes based on how users answer.

features.title: Native integrations
features.description: Connect to CRM, email, payment, and storage platforms.

features.title: Multiple deployment options
features.description: Embed content, or serve it as a popup, chat, exit-intent, or dedicated subdomain.

features.title: Analytics & segmentation
features.description: Track performance and segment the data you collect.

pros: Free Forms/Surveys tier requires no credit card
1000+ templates across content types reduce build time
SOC 2 Type II certified
7-day free trial of the Business plan without a credit card
cons: Free tier is limited to forms and surveys only, capped at 100 leads/month
Business plan starts at $600/month billed annually
Founding year and AI feature details are not disclosed on the site

faqs.question: Does Outgrow have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, a free Forms/Surveys tier is available with 100 leads/month and 4 content pieces.

faqs.question: What is the cheapest paid plan?
faqs.answer: Freelancer Limited starts at $14/month billed annually for 5 content types and 250 leads/month.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 7-day trial of the Business plan is offered without requiring a credit card.

faqs.question: Where is Outgrow based?
faqs.answer: Outgrow lists its headquarters in Florida, USA.

use_cases.title: Lead-generating calculators
use_cases.description: Let shoppers calculate savings or ROI and capture their contact details.

use_cases.title: Interactive content marketing
use_cases.description: Build quizzes and assessments to drive engagement and leads.

use_cases.title: Chatbot-driven qualification
use_cases.description: Qualify prospects conversationally before handing off to sales.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Outgrow?
paragraphs: Outgrow is a no-code platform for building interactive content — quizzes, calculators, chatbots, surveys, polls, forms, and assessments — that qualifies leads and personalizes outcomes with branching logic.
The platform ships with 1000+ templates and can be deployed as an embed, popup, chat widget, exit-intent overlay, or on its own subdomain, with native integrations into CRM, email, and payment tools.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Outgrow is for
paragraphs: Outgrow is built for marketers, agencies, e-commerce businesses, and SaaS companies that want to increase lead generation and conversion rates using interactive content instead of static forms.

enrichment.short_description: ScoreApp is an AI-powered scorecard and quiz builder that qualifies leads with personalized results and follow-up emails.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: ScoreApp lets coaches and agencies build AI scorecards and quizzes that qualify leads with personalized results and automated emails.

features.title: AI scorecard & quiz builders
features.description: Generate scorecards, assessments, quizzes, surveys, waitlists, and forms with AI assistance.

features.title: Dynamic results pages
features.description: Personalize the results shown to each respondent based on their answers.

features.title: Drag-and-drop landing pages
features.description: Build customizable landing pages for each funnel.

features.title: Automated email follow-ups
features.description: Trigger emails based on how users respond.

features.title: CRM integrations
features.description: Connect to HubSpot, Salesforce, Keap, Insightly, Mailchimp, and Kit.

features.title: A/B testing
features.description: Split test scorecards on the Pro plan.

pros: Free plan available with no credit card required
151k+ users worldwide per the company site
CRM integrations built into paid plans
14-day money-back guarantee on paid plans
cons: Free plan capped at 1 live scorecard and 10 responses/month
Advanced insights, custom domain, and abandon emails require the Business plan ($99/month) or higher
Enterprise plan starts at $799/month and needs custom quoting

faqs.question: Is ScoreApp free?
faqs.answer: Yes, a free plan offers 1 live scorecard and up to 10 responses per month.

faqs.question: What does the Starter plan cost?
faqs.answer: $39/month, or $30/month billed annually, for 3 live scorecards and 100 responses/month.

faqs.question: Does ScoreApp integrate with a CRM?
faqs.answer: Yes, direct integrations include HubSpot, Salesforce, Keap, Insightly, Mailchimp, and Kit.

faqs.question: Is there a money-back guarantee?
faqs.answer: Yes, ScoreApp offers a 14-day money-back guarantee.

use_cases.title: Lead-qualifying scorecards
use_cases.description: Score respondents and route qualified leads into automated follow-up emails.

use_cases.title: Audience assessments
use_cases.description: Build assessments that segment prospects by need before a sales call.

use_cases.title: Event waitlists and registrations
use_cases.description: Collect and qualify signups for launches or events.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is ScoreApp?
paragraphs: ScoreApp is a platform for building AI-powered scorecards, assessments, quizzes, surveys, waitlists, and forms that qualify leads and gather customer insights.
Each funnel can show dynamic, personalized results and trigger automated email follow-ups, with direct CRM integrations into HubSpot, Salesforce, Keap, Insightly, Mailchimp, and Kit.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who ScoreApp is for
paragraphs: ScoreApp is aimed at coaches, consultants, agencies, service businesses, and creators who want to attract, qualify, and engage an audience through interactive scorecards rather than static forms.

enrichment.short_description: Opinion Stage is an interactive content platform for building quizzes, polls, surveys, and forms that capture leads.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Opinion Stage lets marketers create quizzes, polls, and surveys with AI to boost engagement and capture leads.

features.title: No-code builder
features.description: Create quizzes, polls, surveys, forms, and calculators from scratch, a template, or AI.

features.title: AI-assisted creation
features.description: Generate interactive content and analyze response patterns with AI.

features.title: Full customization
features.description: Control colors, fonts, logos, and layouts to match your brand.

features.title: Lead & email capture
features.description: Embed lead-capture forms directly inside quizzes and polls.

features.title: Real-time analytics
features.description: Track voting results and completion trends as they happen.

features.title: Integrations
features.description: Connect to tools including Mailchimp and Google Sheets.

pros: Free plan available with no credit card required, including AI creation and lead capture
4.8/5 rating on G2 based on 110 reviews, per the company site
Large scale claimed: 1.3M+ experiences created and 20M+ leads captured
20% discount for annual billing on paid tiers
cons: Free plan limited to 25 responses/month and 2 users
Removing Opinion Stage branding requires the Business plan ($99+/month)
Enterprise pricing is custom and quote-only

faqs.question: Is Opinion Stage free?
faqs.answer: Yes, a free-forever plan includes unlimited items/questions and up to 25 responses per month.

faqs.question: What does the Pro plan cost?
faqs.answer: Starting at $25/month billed annually (or $32/month billed monthly) for 1,000 responses/month.

faqs.question: Does Opinion Stage use AI?
faqs.answer: Yes, AI is used to help build quizzes and polls and to analyze response patterns.

faqs.question: What is Opinion Stage's G2 rating?
faqs.answer: 4.8 out of 5 based on 110 reviews, according to the company's site.

use_cases.title: Lead-capture quizzes
use_cases.description: Embed lead forms inside quizzes to grow an email list.

use_cases.title: Audience polls
use_cases.description: Run real-time voting campaigns to drive engagement.

use_cases.title: Customer feedback surveys
use_cases.description: Collect structured feedback with AI-assisted analysis.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Opinion Stage?
paragraphs: Opinion Stage is an interactive content platform for building quizzes, polls, surveys, forms, and calculators without code, using a from-scratch builder, templates, or AI.
Interactive content can embed lead-capture forms and is backed by real-time analytics on voting results and completion trends.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Opinion Stage is for
paragraphs: Opinion Stage is used by marketers, publishers, content creators, service providers, startups, and enterprises that want to turn traffic into responses, leads, and sales through interactive content.

enrichment.short_description: Youform is a free-forever form and quiz builder with an AI form generator, conditional logic, and 6,000+ Zapier integrations.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Youform offers free, unlimited forms and surveys with an AI form builder, conditional logic, and native Stripe payments.

features.title: AI form builder
features.description: Describe what you need in plain English and AI builds the form's fields and questions.

features.title: 30+ block types
features.description: Text fields, payments, signatures, schedulers, file uploads, and more.

features.title: Conditional logic
features.description: Forms adapt dynamically based on how a respondent answers.

features.title: Partial submissions
features.description: Saves each answer as it's typed, even if the form isn't finished.

features.title: Multiple sharing options
features.description: Share via embeds, links, QR codes, email, or popups.

features.title: Analytics
features.description: Track views, completion rates, and drop-off per question.

features.title: Integrations
features.description: Connect to Stripe, Google Sheets, Notion, Slack, Calendly, Cal.com, SavvyCal, and 6,000+ apps via Zapier.

pros: Free plan offers unlimited forms and responses with no credit card required
EU-based data hosting with GDPR compliance and TLS encryption
Native calendar integrations (Calendly, Cal.com, SavvyCal) and 6,000+ Zapier apps
5/5 rating on Capterra per the company site
cons: Custom domains, branding removal, and Stripe payment collection require the Pro plan ($29/month)
Phone/SMS verification on the Business plan requires bringing your own Twilio account
Founding year and headquarters city are not disclosed on the site

faqs.question: Is Youform really free?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Free plan includes unlimited forms and responses with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What does the Pro plan add?
faqs.answer: Removal of Youform branding, custom domains, Stripe payments, and advanced analytics for $29/month, or $20/month billed annually.

faqs.question: Does Youform have an AI form builder?
faqs.answer: Yes, it generates form fields and questions from a plain-English description.

faqs.question: Does Youform integrate with Zapier?
faqs.answer: Yes, it connects to over 6,000 apps via Zapier plus direct integrations like Calendly and Cal.com.

use_cases.title: Free unlimited surveys
use_cases.description: Run surveys without response caps on the free plan.

use_cases.title: Payment-collecting forms
use_cases.description: Collect payments directly inside a form via Stripe.

use_cases.title: Lead-capture forms with automation
use_cases.description: Send leads into Slack, Notion, or a CRM in real time.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Youform?
paragraphs: Youform is a form builder that positions itself as a free-forever alternative to premium form tools, offering unlimited forms and responses on its free tier.
It includes an AI form generator, conditional logic, partial-submission saving, and native integrations with Stripe, Google Sheets, Notion, Slack, and calendar tools like Cal.com and SavvyCal.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Youform is for
paragraphs: Youform targets indie creators, small teams, and marketing professionals looking for an affordable form and survey builder without response limits on the free tier.

enrichment.short_description: Cal.com is an open-source scheduling platform with calendar sync, built-in video calls, and Stripe-enabled bookings.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Cal.com is an open-source scheduling tool with calendar sync, built-in video calls, Stripe payments, and a free plan.

features.title: Calendar integration
features.description: Prevents double-booking by syncing with connected calendars.

features.title: Custom booking links
features.description: Personalized links such as cal.com/username.

features.title: Cal Video
features.description: Built-in video conferencing for scheduled meetings.

features.title: Automated reminders
features.description: SMS and email reminders plus follow-ups.

features.title: Stripe payments
features.description: Charge for bookings directly through the platform.

features.title: Round-robin scheduling
features.description: Distribute bookings across a team on the Teams plan.

features.title: Open source
features.description: Source code is available on GitHub for self-hosting or customization.

features.title: Cal.ai phone agent
features.description: An AI phone agent that handles automated scheduling calls.

pros: Free plan includes unlimited event types and calendars for one user
Open-source codebase available on GitHub
100+ app integrations, including two-way Salesforce and HubSpot sync, on the free tier
14-day free trial on paid Teams and Organizations plans
cons: Round-robin scheduling and team features require the Teams plan ($12/user/month annual)
SSO, SAML, and compliance checks require the Organizations plan ($28/user/month annual)
Enterprise pricing is custom and quote-only

faqs.question: Is Cal.com free?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Free plan supports one user with unlimited event types, calendars, and Stripe/PayPal payments.

faqs.question: What does the Teams plan cost?
faqs.answer: $12/user/month billed annually, with a 14-day free trial.

faqs.question: Is Cal.com open source?
faqs.answer: Yes, its source code is available on GitHub.

faqs.question: Does Cal.com offer AI features?
faqs.answer: Yes, Cal.ai is an AI phone agent for automated scheduling.

use_cases.title: Individual booking links
use_cases.description: Share a personal link that syncs availability and books meetings automatically.

use_cases.title: Team round-robin scheduling
use_cases.description: Distribute inbound meetings evenly across a sales team.

use_cases.title: Custom scheduling platforms
use_cases.description: Build scheduling into your own product using Cal.com's open-source codebase.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Cal.com?
paragraphs: Cal.com is an open-source scheduling platform that replaces back-and-forth emails with a shareable booking link. It handles calendar syncing, timezone detection, reminders, and video calls.
Paid plans add round-robin scheduling, managed event types, branding removal, and enterprise features like SAML SSO and SCIM provisioning.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Cal.com is for
paragraphs: Cal.com serves individuals, small businesses, sales teams, healthcare practices, and developers who want to build scheduling into their own products using its open-source codebase.

enrichment.short_description: SavvyCal is a scheduling tool that shows recipients their own calendar overlaid on your availability when booking.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: SavvyCal lets meeting recipients overlay their own calendar on your availability, with branding and team scheduling modes.

features.title: Calendar overlay
features.description: Recipients see their own calendar events alongside your availability.

features.title: Week view interface
features.description: Replaces traditional single day/time pickers with a full week view.

features.title: Branding customization
features.description: Custom colors, banner images, and avatars on booking pages.

features.title: Custom domains
features.description: White-labeled booking links on the Premium plan.

features.title: Buffers & limits
features.description: Prevent back-to-back meeting overload.

features.title: Team scheduling modes
features.description: Collective, Round Robin, and Group scheduling for teams.

features.title: Meeting polls
features.description: Let invitees vote on proposed meeting times.

pros: Free tier lets users try the product before paying
30-day money-back guarantee on paid plans
Calendar overlay differentiates it from single-view competitors
Annual billing saves 2 months compared to monthly
cons: Custom domains and paid bookings require the Premium plan ($17/user/month)
No AI features are mentioned on the site
Founding year and headquarters are not disclosed

faqs.question: Is SavvyCal free to try?
faqs.answer: Yes, users can use it for free and upgrade later; paid plans also carry a 30-day money-back guarantee.

faqs.question: What does the Basic plan cost?
faqs.answer: $10/user/month for unlimited calendars, unlimited links, and team scheduling.

faqs.question: What does Premium add?
faqs.answer: Custom domains, delegate-to-assistant access, and paid bookings for $17/user/month.

faqs.question: Does SavvyCal support team scheduling?
faqs.answer: Yes, via Collective, Round Robin, and Group scheduling modes.

use_cases.title: Sales meeting scheduling
use_cases.description: Let prospects overlay their calendar to pick a time that actually works.

use_cases.title: Podcast guest booking
use_cases.description: Share a branded link for guests to book recording slots.

use_cases.title: Client consultations
use_cases.description: Offer buffers and preferred slots for one-on-one sessions.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is SavvyCal?
paragraphs: SavvyCal is a scheduling tool built around a week-view interface where recipients can overlay their own calendar on top of your availability to pick a mutually convenient time.
It supports branding customization, custom domains, buffers, preferred slots, and team scheduling modes such as Collective, Round Robin, and Group.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who SavvyCal is for
paragraphs: SavvyCal serves individuals and teams across sales, marketing, recruiting, customer success, education, and consulting who need scheduling links that feel more collaborative than a simple grid of open slots.

enrichment.short_description: Zencal is a booking platform that handles scheduling, 0%-commission payments, invoicing, and reminders.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Zencal is a booking platform with 0% commission payments, invoicing, SMS reminders, and calendar sync for teams.

features.title: Smart booking
features.description: Clients self-book available time slots online.

features.title: Calendar sync
features.description: Integrates with Google, Outlook, and iCloud calendars.

features.title: Payments with 0% commission
features.description: Built-in processing via Stripe, PayPal, PayU, P24, and tPay.

features.title: Automated reminders
features.description: SMS and email notifications for upcoming bookings.

features.title: Team scheduling
features.description: Round-robin assignment with shared analytics.

features.title: Invoicing
features.description: Invoices are automatically generated and sent to clients.

features.title: Events & bundles
features.description: Package multiple sessions or event registrations together.

features.title: API & webhooks
features.description: Real-time event notifications for custom integrations.

pros: 0% commission on payments processed through the platform
Supports regional payment gateways including PayU, P24, and tPay
14-day free trial with no credit card required
Available in English and Polish
cons: No permanently free plan is offered
Analytics and Events modules are not included on the entry-level Light plan
Founding year and exact headquarters are not disclosed

faqs.question: Does Zencal have a free plan?
faqs.answer: No, but it offers a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What does the Light plan include?
faqs.answer: $10/month per user for unlimited meetings and calendar connections, but no payments, invoicing, or analytics.

faqs.question: Does Zencal charge commission on payments?
faqs.answer: No, payments processed through Zencal carry 0% commission.

faqs.question: What languages does Zencal support?
faqs.answer: English and Polish.

use_cases.title: Service booking with payments
use_cases.description: Sell and schedule paid sessions with 0% commission.

use_cases.title: Team appointment scheduling
use_cases.description: Assign incoming bookings across a team with round-robin routing.

use_cases.title: Consulting session bundles
use_cases.description: Package and sell multiple sessions as a bundle.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Zencal?
paragraphs: Zencal is an online booking platform that automates the full workflow from booking through payment and follow-up, including smart booking pages, calendar sync, and automated SMS/email reminders.
It processes payments with 0% commission across Stripe, PayPal, PayU, P24, and tPay, and adds automatic invoicing, round-robin team scheduling, and API/webhook access on paid plans.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Zencal is for
paragraphs: Zencal serves solo professionals and teams of any size across industries like healthcare, fitness, consulting, and rentals who need booking, payments, and invoicing in one product.

enrichment.short_description: OnceHub combines self-serve booking pages with AI phone and web chat agents to screen, route, and schedule meetings.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: OnceHub pairs booking pages with AI phone and web chat agents to screen leads and schedule meetings across channels.

features.title: Self-serve booking pages
features.description: Branded pages that consolidate multiple calendars into a single smart link.

features.title: AI phone agents
features.description: Automatically answer missed calls and convert them into scheduled meetings.

features.title: AI web chatbots
features.description: Chatbots trained on your content answer questions and route conversations 24/7.

features.title: Lead screening
features.description: Qualify leads before they book a meeting.

features.title: Multi-host meetings
features.description: Support for one-on-one, multi-host, group, and concurrent meeting types.

features.title: CRM integrations
features.description: Two-way sync with Salesforce and HubSpot.

features.title: Compliance certifications
features.description: GDPR, PCI, HIPAA, SOC2, and FINRA certified.

pros: Free Basic plan available with one user, one calendar, and one booking link
AI phone and web chat agents built natively into the platform
Broad compliance certifications (HIPAA, SOC2, FINRA) suit regulated industries
14-day free trial of the Engage plan without a credit card
cons: Dedicated phone numbers and routing forms require paid Schedule/Route plans
AI chatbot functionality is limited to the top-tier Engage plan ($39/seat/month) or above
SSO and HIPAA BAA require an additional Security & Compliance add-on ($5/seat/month)

faqs.question: Is OnceHub free?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Basic plan is free with one user, one calendar, and one booking link.

faqs.question: What does the Schedule plan cost?
faqs.answer: $10/seat/month (discounted from $12) for unlimited booking links, calendars, and meetings.

faqs.question: Does OnceHub include AI features?
faqs.answer: Yes, AI phone agents and web chatbots are available starting with the Engage plan.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 14-day trial of the Engage plan is available without a credit card.

use_cases.title: Missed-call-to-meeting conversion
use_cases.description: Use an AI phone agent to turn missed calls into booked meetings.

use_cases.title: Patient and client booking
use_cases.description: Screen and schedule appointments across multiple hosts.

use_cases.title: Recruiting interview scheduling
use_cases.description: Route candidates to available interviewers automatically.

features: Unlimited booking links, calendars, and meetings

long_form_blocks.heading: What is OnceHub?
paragraphs: OnceHub is an appointment scheduling and engagement platform that manages meetings across web, phone, and chat. It combines branded self-serve booking pages with AI phone agents and web chatbots that screen and route leads.
Paid plans add dedicated phone numbers, routing forms, round-robin distribution, and CRM integrations with Salesforce and HubSpot, backed by GDPR, PCI, HIPAA, SOC2, and FINRA certifications.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who OnceHub is for
paragraphs: OnceHub serves remote and hybrid teams in sales, service delivery, healthcare, financial advising, academia, and recruiting that need to screen and schedule meetings across phone and web channels.

enrichment.short_description: YouCanBookMe lets businesses build customizable booking pages with calendar sync, payments, and automated reminders.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: YouCanBookMe offers customizable booking pages with calendar sync, Stripe payments, and automated reminders.

features.title: Customizable booking pages
features.description: Add your logo, colors, and background images to match your brand.

features.title: Automated notifications
features.description: Confirmations, reminders, and follow-ups via email and SMS.

features.title: Payment processing
features.description: Accepts Apple Pay, Google Pay, and cards via Stripe.

features.title: Calendar sync
features.description: Connects with Google Calendar, Outlook, Apple Calendar, and Microsoft 365.

features.title: Video meeting links
features.description: Supports Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams.

features.title: No-show tracking
features.description: Analytics on cancellations and the client journey.

features.title: Group sessions & discount codes
features.description: Configurable session lengths, buffer times, and promo codes.

pros: Free plan available with one calendar and one booking page
Native Stripe integration for Apple Pay, Google Pay, and card payments
2-week free trial with no credit card required on paid tiers
30-day money-back guarantee on paid plans
cons: Paid plan pricing is not published; Individual, Professional, and Team tiers require contacting sales
Free plan is limited to a single calendar and single booking page
Founding year and headquarters are not disclosed on the site

faqs.question: Is YouCanBookMe free?
faqs.answer: Yes, a Free plan offers 1 calendar connection and 1 booking page.

faqs.question: How much do paid plans cost?
faqs.answer: Pricing for the Individual, Professional, and Team plans is not publicly listed; you need to contact sales.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 2-week free trial is available with no credit card required.

faqs.question: Does YouCanBookMe integrate with Zapier?
faqs.answer: Yes, it connects to over 7,000 apps via Zapier.

use_cases.title: Client appointment booking
use_cases.description: Share a branded page for clients to self-book sessions.

use_cases.title: Team round-robin scheduling
use_cases.description: Distribute bookings across a team automatically.

use_cases.title: Paid session booking
use_cases.description: Collect payment via Stripe when a client books a session.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is YouCanBookMe?
paragraphs: YouCanBookMe is an online scheduling tool for creating customizable booking pages, managing appointments, and automating confirmations, reminders, and follow-ups by email and SMS.
It syncs with Google Calendar, Outlook, Apple Calendar, and Microsoft 365, supports Zoom/Google Meet/Teams for video meetings, and accepts payments via Stripe, including Apple Pay and Google Pay.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who YouCanBookMe is for
paragraphs: YouCanBookMe is used by small businesses, solopreneurs, coaches, consultants, photographers, financial planners, salons, and educators who need a branded booking page for clients.
